title: Circuit-breaker defaults per provider
description: Default circuit_breaker_config values baked into new marketing_provider_configs when the caller doesn't specify. Tenants can override per-provider — but the defaults are tuned for each provider's known-good behaviour.

meta_capi.notes: Meta CAPI is generally reliable. 5-strike default. 1h open duration. Meta's own retry semantics favour bursty retries, so we don't stack retries too aggressively.

google_ads.notes: Google Ads API has stricter auth requirements (OAuth2 token refresh). If auth fails, the breaker opens fast. 3600s = 1h open.

google_analytics_4.notes: GA4 Measurement Protocol is very forgiving (silently accepts most payloads). Higher failure threshold + shorter open duration.

gtm_server.notes: GTM Server is caller-hosted — reliability depends on the tenant's infrastructure. Default 5-strike.

tiktok_events.notes: TikTok Events API is generally reliable but rate-limits aggressively. Circuit-breaker complements the rate-limit gate.

linkedin_insight.notes: LinkedIn API has been known to have longer outages (2-4h). 7200s = 2h open duration to reduce probe frequency.

custom_webhook.notes: Caller-hosted endpoints are typically less reliable. Lower failure threshold + shorter open duration for faster recovery detection.
